zh.lifeSummary: 當Captain Ebenezer Moses Sullivan於1750年10月3日出生在美國緬因州約克貝維其可時，他的父親John Owen Sullivan58歲，母親Margaret or Margery Browne36歲。他於1773年2月18日與Abigail Cotton在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆波斯姆斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1775年登記服兵役。他去世於1799年6月3日在美國新罕布夏州沙利文享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Captain Ebenezer Moses Sullivan于1750年10月3日出生在美国缅因州約克貝維其可时，他的父亲John Owen Sullivan58岁，母亲Margaret or Margery Browne36岁。他于1773年2月18日与Abigail Cotton在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆波斯姆斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1775年登记服兵役。他去世于1799年6月3日在美国新罕布什尔州沙利文享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sullivan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam, Donal, James Patrick, Michael Patrick, Aileen, Brigid, Paddy, Siobhan, John Patrick, Kevin Patrick, Parnell.
Irish (Cork and Kerry): shortened form of   O'Sullivan  .

variants.name: O'Sullivan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Liam, Siobhan, Declan, Kieran, Cathal, Dermot, Eamon, Fergus, Grainne, Seamus.
Irish (Munster): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Súileabháin ‘descendant of Súileabhán’, a personal name from súil ‘eye’ + dubh ‘dark’ + the diminutive suffix -án. Compare Sullivan .

nameMeanings.name: Ebenezer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a biblical place name (meaning ‘stone of help’ in Hebrew). This was the site of the battle where the Israelites were defeated by the Philistines (1 Samuel 4:1). After they took their revenge, Samuel set up a memorial stone bearing this name (1 Samuel 7:12). It was taken up as a given name by the Puritans in the 17th century, possibly after being misread in the Bible as a personal name, or else because of its favourable etymological connotations. It now has unfavourable connotations because of the miserly character of  Ebenezer Scrooge  in  Charles Dickens's  A Christmas Carol (  1843 ), but nevertheless is still occasionally used.

nameMeanings.name: Moses
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, the English form of the name of the patriarch (Moshe in Hebrew) who led the Israelites out of Egypt (Exodus 4). His name is thought to be of Egyptian origin, most probably from the same root as that found in the second element of names such as Tutmosis and Rameses, where it means ‘born of (a certain god)’. Various Hebrew etymologies have been proposed, beginning with the biblical ‘saved (from the water)’ (Exodus 2:10), but none is convincing. It is now mainly a Jewish name, although until the mid-20th century it also enjoyed considerable popularity among Christians in England, especially among Puritans and Nonconformists.

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: The First Constitution
historicEvents.description: Serving the newly created United States of America as the first constitution, the Articles of Confederation were an agreement among the 13 original states preserving the independence and sovereignty of the states. But with a limited central government, the Constitutional Convention came together to replace the Articles of Confederation with a more established Constitution and central government on where the states can be represented and voice their concerns and comments to build up the nation.

historicEvents.title: New Hampshire Helps Ratify the US Constitution
historicEvents.description: On June 21, 1788, New Hampshire became the ninth and final state needed to ratify the US Constitution and make it the official law of the land
Bill of Rights guarantees individual freedom.

historicEvents.title: The Bill of Rights
historicEvents.description: After the Constitution was made, some objections were raised by Anti-Federalists. So, in response ten amendments were discussed and voted on to become The Bill of Rights. These rights were made to clarify and guarantee certain freedoms of residents of the country.

en.lifeSummary: When Captain Ebenezer Moses Sullivan was born on 3 October 1750, in Berwick, York, Maine, United States, his father, John Owen Sullivan, was 58 and his mother, Margaret or Margery Browne, was 36. He married Abigail Cotton on 18 February 1773, in Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He registered for military service in 1775. He died on 3 June 1799, in Sullivan, New Hampshire, United States, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Captain Ebenezer Moses Sullivan est né le 3 octobre 1750, à Berwick, York, Maine, États-Unis, son père, John Owen Sullivan, avait 58 ans et sa mère, Margaret or Margery Browne, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Abigail Cotton le 18 février 1773, à Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1775. Il est décédé le 3 juin 1799, à Sullivan, New Hampshire, États-Unis, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Captain Ebenezer Moses Sullivan am 3. Oktober 1750 in Berwick, York, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Owen Sullivan 58 und seine Mutter Margaret or Margery Browne 36. Er hat am 18. Februar 1773 in Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America Abigail Cotton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er hat sich 1775 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 3. Juni 1799 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Sullivan, New Hampshire, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Captain Ebenezer Moses Sullivan è nato il il 3 ottobre 1750 nel Berwick, York, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, John Owen Sullivan, aveva 58 anni e il suo madre, Margaret or Margery Browne, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Abigail Cotton il 18 febbraio 1773, nel Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1775. Morì il 3 giugno 1799, nel Sullivan, New Hampshire, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Captain Ebenezer Moses Sullivanが1750年10月3日にアメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークバーウィックで生まれた時，父John Owen Sullivanは58歳，母Margaret or Margery Browneは36歳であった。1773年2月18日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアロクインガムポルトスモウスでAbigail Cottonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1775年に兵役登録をした。彼は1799年6月3日にアメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州スリヴァンで48歳で死去した。

ko.Portsmouth, Rockingham, Colony of New Ha: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 포츠모우스
ko.Sullivan, Cheshire, New Hampshire, Briti: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 체실르 설리반
ko.lifeSummary: Captain Ebenezer Moses Sullivan(이)가 1750년 10월 3일 미국 메인 주 요르크 버윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Owen Sullivan(은)는 58세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret or Margery Browne(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1773년 2월 18일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 포츠모우스에서 Abigail Cotton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1775년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1799년 6월 3일 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 설리반에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Captain Ebenezer Moses Sullivan nasceu em 3 de outubro de 1750, em Berwick, York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, John Owen Sullivan, tinha 58 anos e sua mãe, Margaret or Margery Browne, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Abigail Cotton em 18 de fevereiro de 1773, em Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1775. Ele faleceu em 3 de junho de 1799, em Sullivan, Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América, com 48 anos.

ru.Portsmouth, Rockingham, Colony of New Ha: порцмоут, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Charleston, Charleston, South Carolina,: чарльстон, чарльстон, Южная Каролина, Соединенные штаты
ru.Sullivan, Cheshire, New Hampshire, Briti: сулливан, чешир, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Captain Ebenezer Moses Sullivan родился 3 октября 1750 г. в местности бирвикк, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени John Owen Sullivan было 58 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret or Margery Browne, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Abigail Cotton 18 февраля 1773 г. в местности порцмоут, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. В 1775 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 3 июня 1799 г. в местности сулливан, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Captain Ebenezer Moses Sullivan nació el 3 de octubre de 1750, en Berwick, York, Maine, Estados Unidos, su papá, John Owen Sullivan, tenía 58 años y su mamá, Margaret or Margery Browne, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Abigail Cotton el 18 de febrero de 1773, en Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1775. Murió el 3 de junio de 1799, en Sullivan, Nuevo Hampshire, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 48 años.
